CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, content STRING);
SELECT id, string_split(content, ',') AS split_content FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, string_split(content, ',') AS split_content FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(content) > 10;
SELECT id, ARRAY_LENGTH(string_split(content, ',')) AS split_count FROM test_strings WHERE id > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (id INTEGER, value FLOAT);
SELECT t.id, string_split(ts.content, ',') AS split_content FROM test_strings ts JOIN test_numbers t ON t.id = ts.id;
SELECT t.id, string_split(ts.content, ',') AS split_content FROM test_strings ts LEFT JOIN test_numbers t ON ts.id = t.id WHERE ts.content LIKE '%,%';
WITH split_data AS (SELECT id, string_split(content, ',') AS split_content FROM test_strings) SELECT id, UNNEST(split_content) AS individual_strings FROM split_data;
CREATE TABLE multi_lang (id INTEGER, phrase STRING);
INSERT INTO multi_lang VALUES (1, 'Hello, World'), (2, 'Hola, Mundo'), (3, 'Bonjour, le Monde');
SELECT id, string_split(phrase, ', ') AS split_phrase FROM multi_lang WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE id < 3);
SELECT id, string_split(phrase, ', ') AS split_phrase FROM multi_lang WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_numbers WHERE id = multi_lang.id);
SELECT id, ARRAY_TO_STRING(string_split(content, ','), '|') FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
